use_cases: Hero section animated backgrounds for SaaS landing pages
Full-screen gradient backdrops for fintech dashboards
Visual shader effects for dev-tools and Web3 product pages
Dynamic backgrounds for creative portfolios and media sites
Eye-catching animated overlays for any application section
ai_summary: An animated gradient shader background component that creates flowing stripe-like patterns with smooth color transitions between white, cyan, and purple hues. Uses the GradFlow library for continuous morphing animations, ideal for creating visually striking hero sections or full-page backgrounds in SaaS, fintech, and tech product applications.
